scripts.build:
echo "
🏗️  Building Skriuw Monorepo
" && turbo run build --filter=!tools/* && echo "
🔧 Building CLI Tools
" && turbo run build:cli --filter=tools/* && echo "
✅ Build Complete!
"
scripts.build:packages: echo "\n📦 Building Packages\n" && turbo run build --filter=packages/*
scripts.build:apps: echo "\n🚀 Building Applications\n" && turbo run build --filter=apps/*
scripts.build:cli: echo "\n🔧 Building CLI Tools\n" && turbo run build:cli --filter=tools/*
scripts.dev:
bun tools/check-db.ts && echo "
🚀 Starting Skriuw...
📦 Database: ${DATABASE_PROVIDER:-postgres} (Check .env to switch)
" && turbo dev
scripts.lint:
echo "
🔍 Linting Code
" && turbo lint && echo "
✅ Linting Complete!
"
scripts.check-types:
echo "
🔎 Type Checking
" && turbo check-types && echo "
✅ Type Checking Complete!
"
scripts.test:
echo "
🧪 Running Tests
" && turbo test && echo "
✅ Testing Complete!
"
scripts.test:ci:
echo "
🧪 Running CI Tests
" && turbo test --filter=!tools/* && echo "
✅ CI Testing Complete!
"
scripts.clean:
echo "
🧹 Cleaning Build Artifacts
" && turbo clean && echo "
✅ Cleaning Complete!
"
scripts.ci:
echo "
🚀 CI Pipeline
" && bun run check-types && bun run lint && bun run test:ci && bun run build && echo "
🎉 CI Pipeline Complete!
"
